plugins.name: brain-connect
plugins.description: Find useful cross-project links in the central Obsidian "brain": where something built, learned, or decided in ONE project is reusable in ANOTHER

plugins.name: brain-init
plugins.description: Register the current repository (or one the user names) with a central Obsidian "second brain" vault

plugins.name: brain-report
plugins.description: Generate a generalized progress report across ALL projects in the central Obsidian "brain" vault — progress over a time period, what got done, pending tasks, overall project states, and what needs…

plugins.name: brain-sync
plugins.description: Protocol for working in a repo that contains a `.brain/` folder — the bridge to a central Obsidian "second brain" vault

plugins.name: coolify
plugins.description: Manage a self-hosted Coolify PaaS over its API — list/inspect/create/update/delete applications, databases, services, servers, projects, and environment variables

plugins.name: coolify-audit
plugins.description: Read-only audit of a Coolify instance — full resource inventory, env-var hygiene (plaintext secrets), exposed ports, and servers that need validation

plugins.name: coolify-deploy
plugins.description: Trigger a Coolify deployment and VALIDATE it — poll the build to a terminal state, then check app health, and report PASS/FAIL with logs on failure

plugins.name: email-assistant
plugins.description: Draft email replies and new messages grounded in the user's second-brain (project context, prior decisions), and track multi-message threads so a long back-and-forth stays coherent

plugins.name: breakdown
plugins.description: Split an oversized or vague card into small, independently-shippable subtasks with clear acceptance criteria

plugins.name: dependency-graph
plugins.description: Print the dependency graph of board cards — recently closed + currently open — as a Mermaid diagram, an ASCII tree (roots first), plus cycle and dangling-reference diagnostics

plugins.name: prune
plugins.description: Clean dead weight off a project board — duplicates, stale/obsolete cards, things already done, and zombie items no one will ever do

plugins.name: refine
plugins.description: Backlog refinement / grooming / enrichment — make a backlog ready to work: enrich thin cards with context and acceptance criteria, estimate, order by priority, and flag what's blocked, duplicated, or…

plugins.name: ship
plugins.description: Take the top kanban card all the way to shipped: claim it, verify it isn't already implemented, build backend+frontend+tests, commit, and move it to "In review" — keeping the board in sync

plugins.name: triage
plugins.description: Sort a pile of incoming/unsorted items on a project board — route each to the right list, set priority AND size, detect dependencies between cards, flag duplicates, and surface what needs a human…

plugins.name: prove-it-validation
plugins.description: Discipline skill: before claiming any task succeeded, VERIFY it programmatically and SHOW the evidence (real command output, test runs, diffs, queries — and for anything visual, a screenshot /…

plugins.name: human-readable-report
plugins.description: Write a report a human actually wants to read — status update, summary, analysis, retro, or briefing

plugins.name: proposal-writer
plugins.description: Draft a client/business proposal, quote, or pitch — problem, scope, deliverables, timeline, price, assumptions, and a clear call to action

plugins.name: issue-fix-workflow
plugins.description: Flujo de trabajo para llevar UN issue de GitHub desde que se elige hasta un PR probado y con evidencia, en CUALQUIER repo

plugins.name: game-improvement-analysis
plugins.description: Analyze a game's codebase and produce a prioritized, actionable improvement report — concrete problems, ideas, and changes — ranked by player-experience priorities (default Fun > Feel > Performance >…
